title: leonotis pallida
intro: Leonotis pallida, also known as Kamkhwa or White Lion's Tail, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Leonotis pallida has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, thanks to its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system. Herbal preparations of Leonotis pallida can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and essential oils, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural relief.
